prediction_outcome: Scenario B confirmed (K uniform) + Scenario D partially confirmed (V differentiates)
key_finding: K spectral properties do NOT differentiate answer from dispensable heads (K eff rank ratio 1.003-1.005, p=0.76-0.94 ns). Head specialization is a Q*K interaction effect. SURPRISE: V spectral properties DO differentiate — answer heads V eff rank +1.1-1.2 higher (p<0.0001 both models). Answer heads carry more distributed V-content.
evidence_impact: Strong negative — K spectral geometry cannot predict head function. Adds two new evidence entries (#94, #95). Adds one disconfirmed claim. Opens new question about V-content specialization.
next_planned: Q-head spectral analysis to test whether head specialization lives in Q projections; attention pattern analysis for answer heads

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads (Exp 064). V spectral geometry DOES differentiate answer vs dispensable heads.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama. Per-head K spectral uniform. V spectral differentiates. Head specialization is Q*K interaction, not K geometry.

natural_usage.status: DECISIVE for post-hoc: 'Recent' 134/134 pooled [97.3%, 100%]. CAVEAT: may not generalize to real-time decoding.
